description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM_GPU-CUDA Nightly Build that triggers on pull requests to main, pushes to main, a nightly schedule, and manual dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: build_artifact and test_and_publish_artifact. The build_artifact job runs on an amazonlinux:2023 container, sets up the environment, checks out the repository, and builds FBGEMM_GPU nightly for multiple Python and CUDA versions. The test_and_publish_artifact job downloads the built artifact, tests it on a GPU, and pushes it to PyPI if the CUDA version matches.
